query: Hades II Post-Launch Patch 2 Hotfix 4 Nintendo Switch PlayStation 5 Xbox Series X/S release date

mako.raw:
{"query":"Hades II Post-Launch Patch 2 Hotfix 4 Nintendo Switch PlayStation 5 Xbox Series X/S release date","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1525,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://nintendoeverything.com/hades-2-june-2026-update-announced-patch-notes/","title":"Hades 2 June 2026 update announced, patch notes","content":"Supergiant Games has announced another update for Hades 2, which is the game’s third hotfix.
Hades 2 June 2026 update patch notes"},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/hades-ii-coming-to-xbox-playstation-april-14/","title":"Hades II Coming to Xbox & PlayStation on April 14! | Supergiant Games","content":"Mar 26, 2026 — Hades II is coming to Xbox Series X|S + Game Pass and PlayStation 5 on April 14! Nintendo Switch 2, and Nintendo Switch on September 25 last ...
Xbox and PlayStation players will soon find out why our first-ever sequel became the best-reviewed game of 2025 according to Metacritic and OpenCritic, following its v1.0 launch on PC, Nintendo Switch 2, and Nintendo Switch on September 25 last year."},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/","title":"Supergiant Games","content":"Darren will be joined by vocalist Ashley Barrett, whose voice is featured in each of our games since Bastion, as well as special guests Judy Alice Lee (voice of Melinoë), Erin Yvette (voice of Scylla and Dora), and Colin Ryan (voice of Apollo), all with orchestral accompaniment by the London Mozart Players conducted by Austin Wintory.
We're very excited to announce that Hades II is coming to Xbox Series X|S + Game Pass and PlayStation 5 on April 14!
Hades II for Xbox and PlayStation has been our focus since last year's v1.0 launch, during which time the game earned numerous industry accolades, including Best Action Game at The Game Awards and the D.I.C.E.
To everyone who's anticipated Hades II coming to more platforms, thank you for your patience, and we hope you'll find our latest game to be well worth the wait!
Full patch notes are here (Steam).
And please enjoy this new art piece featuring Zagreus, Megaera, and Thanatos by our resident illustrator, Jeremy Anninos!
If you already have Hades II in Early Access on Steam or the Epic Games Store, v1.0 will be a free automatic update.
Hades II takes advantage of the new Nintendo Switch 2 hardware, offering up blazing fast 120 frames-per-second performance at 1080p while playing in TV Mode.
In Handheld Mode, the game runs at 60 frames-per-second at 1080p, while the Nintendo Switch version runs at 60 frames-per-second at 720p in both modes.
Among the additions coming in v1.0, Hades II offers cross-saves between the Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 versions, and the Steam and the Epic Games Store versions."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/videos/hades-2-official-ps5-and-xbox-series-xs-release-date-trailer-xbox-partner-preview-showcase-2026","title":"Hades 2 - Official PS5 and Xbox Series X|S Release Date Trailer | Xbox Partner Preview Showcase 2026 - IGN","content":"IGNhttps://www.ign.com · Mar 26, 2026IGNhttps://www.ign.com · Mar 26, 20261:07Hades 2 is launching on April 14 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, game being available now on Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and ...
Hades 2 is launching on April 14 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and Xbox on PC, with the game being available now on Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC."},{"url":"https://www.nintendolife.com/news/2026/04/hades-ii-has-some-bonus-content-planned-for-next-week","title":"Hades II Has Some Bonus Content Planned For Next Week | Nintendo Life","content":"Update [Sat 11th Apr 2026, 2:05am]: Supergiant Games has issued a reminder about the Hades II update, which will be dropping alongside the Xbox and PlayStation 5 versions of the game next week on 14th April 2026.
The full patch notes will be shared on release.
"HADES II for Xbox and PlayStation launches digitally worldwide on April 14, in just a few days!
Here are the release times for Xbox and PS5 versions of the game, which should also provide an idea of when this latest game update will drop:
Hades II developer Supergiant Games yesterday announced it would be bringing the Princess of the Underworld to Xbox and PlayStation platforms on 14th April 2026."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Hades II Post-Launch Patch 2 Hotfix 4 Nintendo Switch PlayStation 5 Xbox Series X/S release date","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://me.ign.com/en/hades-ii/236180/news/hades-2-global-release-times-confirmed","title":"Hades 2 Global Release Times Confirmed","content":"# Hades 2 Global Release Times Confirmed. 24, 2025, 3:47 p.m. Related reads:Hades 2 - Official PS5 and Xbox Series X|S Release Date Trailer | Xbox Partner Preview Showcase 2026. The sequel to Supergiant's hit game Hades, Hades 2 mixes engaging storytelling and roguelite action elements for an engaging dungeon-crawling experience. It's a timed console exclusive on Nintendo Switch 1 and 2, offering \"blazing-fast 120fps in TV Mode on Nintendo Switch 2,\" or 60fps on Nintendo Switch (which you can upgrade to Switch 2 from for free when you're ready). Playing the early access build, we awarded Hades 2 9/10, writing: \"Even in its Early Access state, Hades 2 is just about everything one could ask for in a sequel to one of the best roguelites of all time. Hades 2 global release times. ### Thursday, September 25, 2025 on Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store. ### Friday, September 26, 2025 on Switch, Switch 2, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.","score":0.71040785,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.rpgsite.net/news/20118-hades-ii-april-2026-patch-notes-ps5-xbox-game-pass-download-discount","title":"Hades II is now available on PS5 and Xbox including Game Pass alongside Patch 2 for all platforms | RPG Site","content":"Hades II is now available on PS5 and Xbox including Game Pass alongside Patch 2 for all platforms. Supergiant Games has announced that **Hades II**is available on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S and it is also included in Xbox Game Pass. Hades II's new platforms launch today is accompanied by Patch 2 for all platforms. > • **Fated Prophecy Updates**: Prophecies about characters such as Odysseus and Arachne now have new narrated conclusion scenes, which can be viewed in the Fated List once those Prophecies are fulfilled. >  • **New Dialogue Events**: Many of the game's characters have new things to say at various points throughout the story. >  • **...And More!** Look for dreamy new decorative items in the Crossroads Training Grounds, a new alternate form for each Animal Familiar, and additional surprises we hope you'll enjoy! >  • **Melinoë** now has more to say to the  in the Fields of Mourning.","score":0.6907474,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/hades-ii-coming-to-xbox-playstation-april-14","title":"Hades II Coming to Xbox & PlayStation on April 14! | Supergiant Games","content":"# Hades II Coming to Xbox & PlayStation on April 14!
